title: Procrastination is My Hobby
subtitle: Expert Level Avoidance
description: Be honest with yourself! This charming design celebrates the art of putting things off - because sometimes you just need to chill, scroll, and enjoy the moment without guilt. Featuring a relaxed brain and a laid-back person surrounded by procrastination icons (phones, coffee, TV, books - all waiting to be 'dealt with'). The soft, warm pastel gradient creates a cozy, guilt-free vibe. Perfect for ADHD folks who know that sometimes rest IS productive, and that's okay! Wear this proudly and let everyone know you're a certified procrastination master.
mockupPrompt: Product mockup on a white ceramic travel mug, professional studio lighting, the mug features a design with a relaxed cartoon brain with closed eyes, a chill person sitting in a chair, and procrastination icons like phones and coffee cups floating around. The text reads 'PROCRASTINATION IS MY HOBBY' in bold white letters with a soft glow effect. The background is a soft pastel gradient from mint green to peach to pink. The mug is placed on a wooden surface with natural light from the side, shot from a 3/4 angle, high resolution, commercial product photography style with shallow depth of field
targetAudience: ADHD individuals who relate to procrastination, people who love to put things off, anyone who needs permission to rest
